product_updates.title: Alphabet plans to raise $80B to pay for AI buildout
product_updates.content: "The company is experiencing strong demand for its AI solutions and services from enterprises and consumers, at levels that are exceeding the company’s available supply," Alphabet said in its statement.

product_updates.title: Nvidia chases $200B CPU market with AI agent PCs from Microsoft, Dell, and HP
product_updates.content: If Nvidia has cracked a way to bring AI agents easily, safely, and usefully to the masses, it could — and should — be big.

product_updates.title: Florida sues OpenAI, Sam Altman, in first-of-its-kind lawsuit over violent incidents
product_updates.content: The lawsuit partially revolves around a shooting at Florida State University last year, and ChatGPT's alleged role in the incident.

product_updates.title: Water access is now a risk factor in SpaceX’s IPO
product_updates.content: The company says it needs "significant" water resources to cool its data centers, and that access to abundant, affordable water is a challenge.

product_updates.title: Anthropic files to go public
product_updates.content: Anthropic, now an AI powerhouse that has landed top-tier enterprise customers, was once considered an underdog in the emerging world of large language models.

product_updates.title: This AI weather startup is out-forecasting government agencies
product_updates.content: WindBorne benefits from its unique combination of model-building and data collection. The company now has about 400 balloons in flight gathering sensor readings at any given time, launched from 15 sites around the globe. The advances in its current model come from improvements in how the data col…

product_updates.title: DuckDuckGo makes its ‘no-AI’ search engine easier to access as its traffic booms
product_updates.content: Alternative search engine DuckDuckGo launches 'no AI' web extensions for Chrome and Firefox users.

technical_breakthroughs.title: Dozens of Red Hat packages backdoored through its official NPM channel
technical_breakthroughs.content: Anyone who has downloaded affected Red Hat packages should investigate immediately.

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: China’s brain implant ambitions
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. technical_breakthroughs.title: China has approved the world’s first invasive brain-computer chip—here’s what’s next
technical_breakthroughs.content: One day last October, sitting in the courtyard of his house in China’s Henan province, Dong Hui decided to see if he could hold a pen to write. Dong, 39, had sustained spinal cord injuries in a car accident six years earlier that left him paralyzed from the neck down. Slowly but determinedly, he …
